description: A White House observance graphic built on a color photograph taken in the Oval Office. At the center sits Donald Trump at the Resolute Desk, head bowed and hands clasped, surrounded by roughly a dozen people in business attire (men and women, several reaching in to lay hands on his shoulders and back). Behind them are the Oval Office windows, American flags and a row of military/service flags. The lower third of the image darkens into a gradient where centered text appears: a smaller white serif line 'National Day Of' above the very large white serif word 'PRAYER'. At the bottom center is the engraved White House building logo with 'The WHITE HOUSE' wordmark. The tweet quotes Psalm 96 and refers to America as 'one nation under God'.
notable_text: National Day Of PRAYER | The WHITE HOUSE
